profile.headline: Aspiring Data Scientist & ML Engineer / Junior Software Developer (Backend)
profile.availability: Available for new freelance projects and open to opportunities
profile.summary: Builds custom AI systems, data pipelines, and scalable backend APIs. Focus areas include computer vision, machine learning, RAG/LLM systems, and cloud data engineering with Microsoft Fabric and AWS.

experience.title: Junior Software Developer (Backend)
experience.description: Designing and building scalable REST APIs and backend services using Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL on AWS Cloud for smart logistics and delivery management platforms.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Data Science
education.school: R. C. Patel Institute of Technology, Shirpur - An Autonomous Institute

education.degree: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering

storyTimeline.title: The Beginning
storyTimeline.subtitle: Early Curiosity
storyTimeline.description: Journey into technology started with curiosity and a desire to solve problems. Always fascinated by how things work and loved taking apart gadgets to understand their inner workings.

storyTimeline.title: Secondary School Certificate (SSC)
storyTimeline.subtitle: K. S. K. New City High School, Dhule
storyTimeline.description: Completed secondary school education with strong foundation in science and mathematics. Developed analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.

storyTimeline.title: Medical Recovery & Academic Resilience Journey
storyTimeline.subtitle: Personal Development & Recovery
storyTimeline.description: Faced a significant medical challenge that required extensive recovery and rehabilitation, with multiple surgical procedures and an extended recovery that impacted educational progression. Maintained commitment to academic excellence and personal development.
storyTimeline.detailedDescription: In December 2015, sustained a severe fracture in the left leg that broke completely from the main upper joint. Required immediate surgery with screws fitted to support the bone. Was in 9th standard and had to rest for 2 years to heal. Significantly impacted 10th standard performance (50% marks) due to irregular school attendance. Could not walk properly for several more years after the initial recovery; full recovery and normal mobility took a total of 6 years.

storyTimeline.title: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering
storyTimeline.subtitle: R. C. Patel Polytechnic, Shirpur
storyTimeline.description: Comprehensive foundation in computer science fundamentals, programming languages, and software development methodologies with strong emphasis on practical applications.

storyTimeline.title: Bachelor of Technology in Data Science
storyTimeline.subtitle: R. C. Patel Institute of Technology, Shirpur - An Autonomous Institute
storyTimeline.description: Specialized in Data Science with focus on Machine Learning, Statistics, and Data Analysis. Developed expertise in modern AI technologies and data-driven solutions.

storyTimeline.title: Junior Software Developer
storyTimeline.subtitle: GrubPac Technologies, Delhi, India
storyTimeline.description: Designing and building scalable REST APIs and backend services using Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL on AWS Cloud for smart logistics and delivery management platforms.

storyTimeline.title: The Future & Vision
storyTimeline.subtitle: Aspiring Data Scientist
storyTimeline.description: Preparing for GATE 2027 while building innovative projects and contributing to the tech community. Goal is to become a leading data scientist who creates solutions that make a positive impact on society.

achievements.title: Grand Finalist
achievements.description: Spearheaded a cross-functional effort at SUNHACKS 2022, an International Level Hackathon, securing Grand Finalist recognition among 15 elite teams.

achievements.title: Grand Finalist
achievements.description: Achieved Grand Finalist status at the National level in the Smart India Hackathon 2022, competing against 50 teams.

achievements.title: Internal Hackathon Lead
achievements.description: Led and coordinated an Internal Hackathon for Smart India Hackathon 2023, overseeing 85 teams and fostering innovation and collaboration.

mission.title: My Mission
mission.content: To leverage the power of artificial intelligence and data science to solve real-world problems, create innovative solutions, and make technology more accessible and beneficial for everyone. Committed to continuous learning, ethical development practices, and building a future where technology serves humanity's greatest needs.
goals: Develop AI solutions that address real-world challenges
Contribute to open-source projects and the tech community
Mentor others and share knowledge through writing and teaching
Build ethical and responsible AI systems
Create technology that improves people's lives

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Strive for excellence in everything - from writing clean code to delivering exceptional user experiences.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Push boundaries and find creative solutions to complex problems using cutting-edge technology.

values.title: Learning
values.description: Continuous learning is at the heart of the journey - always exploring new technologies and expanding knowledge.

values.title: Impact
values.description: Create technology that makes a positive difference in people's lives and contributes to society's betterment.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: Believe in teamwork and enjoy working with others to build something greater than the sum of its parts.

values.title: Resilience
values.description: Personal journey taught that resilience and determination can overcome any obstacle in life.

shortTermGoals.goal: Complete React 19 migration for all projects

learningNow.title: Advanced React Patterns
learningNow.description: Exploring compound components, render props, and custom hooks for better component architecture.

learningNow.title: LLM Fine-tuning & RAG
learningNow.description: Going deeper into retrieval-augmented generation, vector databases, and fine-tuning large language models for domain-specific use cases.

learningNow.title: Multimodal AI
learningNow.description: Studying vision-language models and multimodal architectures that combine computer vision with NLP beyond single-modality pipelines.

learningNow.title: Model Optimization & Inference
learningNow.description: Advancing into model quantization, ONNX/TensorRT export, and low-latency inference for production and edge deployment.

closingQuote.text: Every setback is a setup for a comeback. The challenges I've faced have only made me stronger, more determined, and more passionate about using technology to create positive change.

booking.howToBook: Visit /services to review offerings, then use the service inquiry form on /services or the contact form on /contact. Email contact.himanshusalunke@gmail.com to start.

payment.advance: 50% advance required to book a slot and begin architecture
notes: Client pays cloud hosting and third-party API costs (AWS/GCP, OpenAI, etc.)
Client receives 100% IP rights and full source code after final payment
14 days of post-delivery support for bug fixes and minor tweaks

faqHints: Off-topic / general knowledge / unrelated coding / news / other people → politely refuse; only Himanshu + this portfolio are in scope
Current job / is he working / employer / GrubPac / experience → experience + storyTimeline work entry; page /about (never /work)
Personal story / recovery / resilience / childhood → storyTimeline; page /about
Achievements / hackathons / SIH / SUNHACKS → achievements; page /about
Mission / values / goals → mission, values, shortTermGoals; page /about
Projects / case studies / portfolio work → projects array; page /work
Services / freelancing / pricing / how to book → services object; page /services or /contact
Skills / tech stack / proficiency → skills + techStackGroups + skillCategories; page /developer
What is this website built with → portfolioSiteStack; page /developer
Contact / hire / collaborate / phone / email → profile.email (primary), profile.phone, profile.linkedin; page /contact
Secondary footer email is profile.secondaryEmail - prefer profile.email unless user asks for alternate email
Resume / CV → profile.resumeUrl (/Himanshu_Salunke_Resume.pdf) also on header and /about
